productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Red Pooh Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton white top with light red polka dots and PoohWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort Fitdisney's white top with red polka dots, puff sleeves, a frilly base and a smiling Pooh will make your little princess the most adorable looking girl in town. Couple this with a pair of denim shorts and your little darling is all set for an evening of fun this summer.
